zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Danvers於1491年出生在英國奧可福爾普雷斯可特時，她的父親Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey39歲，母親Anne Stradling22歲。她於1511年與Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq.在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾阿斯特維爾 煙雨 法爾庫特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年7月11日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾阿斯特維爾 煙雨 法爾庫特享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Danvers于1491年出生在英国奧可福爾普雷斯可特时，她的父亲Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey39岁，母亲Anne Stradling22岁。她于1511年与Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq.在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾阿斯特維爾 煙雨 法爾庫特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年7月11日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾阿斯特維爾 煙雨 法爾庫特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Danvers was born in 1491, in Prescote, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, was 39 and her mother, Anne Stradling, was 22. She married Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. in 1511, in Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 11 July 1528, in Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Danvers est née en 1491, à Prescote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Anne Stradling, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. en 1511, à Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1528, à Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Danvers 1491 in Prescote, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey 39 und ihre Mutter Anne Stradling 22. Sie hat 1511 in Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1528 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Danvers è nata il nel 1491 nel Prescote, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Anne Stradling, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. nel 1511, nel Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1528, nel Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Danversが1491年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアプレスコトで生まれた時，父Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfeyは39歳，母Anne Stradlingは22歳であった。1511年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアストウエル ウィス ファルクウットでThomas Lovett of Astwell Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1528年7月11日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアストウエル ウィス ファルクウットで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Danvers(이)가 1491년 영국 스퍼드실르 플레스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Stradling(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 애스트웰 위스 파쿠트에서 Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 애스트웰 위스 파쿠트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Danvers nasceu em 1491, em Prescote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Anne Stradling, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. em 1511, em Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de julho de 1528, em Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Danvers родилась в 1491 г. в местности прескот, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Stradling, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. в 1511 г. в местности аствелл вит фалкутт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 11 июля 1528 г. в местности аствелл вит фалкутт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Danvers nació en 1491, en Prescote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Anne Stradling, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas Lovett of Astwell Esq. en 1511, en Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1528, en Astwell with Falcutt, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
